title: centaurea spruneri subsp. lineariloba
intro: Centaurea spruneri subsp. lineariloba is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting wound healing. Centaurea spruneri subsp. lineariloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
